jd_text: Role Description This is a full-time on-site role based in Dubai for the Head of Marketing – Russian Speaker at Plekhanov University Dubai. The Head of Marketing will lead the planning, execution, and management of marketing strategies, campaigns, and initiatives to drive growth and enhance the university's brand presence. Daily responsibilities include conducting market research, overseeing marketing communications, managing public relations activities, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to achieve recruitment and enrollment targets. The role also involves fostering partnerships and directing sales strategies to attract prospective students. Qualifications Proficiency in Market Planning, Marketing Management, and creating comprehensive marketing strategies. Strong abilities in Market Research to identify trends and actionable insights. Experience in Sales and developing outreach strategies to achieve enrollment goals. Expertise in Public Relations and executing effective campaigns to enhance brand visibility. Excellent written and verbal communication skills, including fluency in Russian and English. Proven leadership capabilities and the ability to manage a diverse team. Strong organizational and project management skills with a results-driven approach. Relevant experience in the education sector is a plus. Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field; a Master's degree would be an advantage.
